name: Lamb Rib Chops Wih Quince Jelly Glaze
recipeInstructions:
Quince Jelly Glaze: In a small saucepan, sauté garlic in butter over medium heat. Add jelly, rosemary, pepper, and salt. Mix well. Cook, stirring constantly, until the jelly has just melted. Remove from heat and set aside.
Broiled Lamb Chops: Preheat the electric broiler (do not preheat a gas broiler). Arrange chops on the rack in the broiler pan. Generously brush the top side of each chop with half the glaze. Broil the chops 3-4 inches from the heat for 6 minutes until browned. Turn the chops over and brush with the remaining glaze. Broil for 4-5 more minutes until done to your liking.
